action: Assign one teacher avatar to each genre (Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Science, AI, Weather) and save the genre-avatar assignment for future use.
fallback_action: Log the error and continue with default or previously saved genre-avatar assignments.

recipe.steps: Retrieve the list of teacher avatar IDs saved in memory using the key avatars.teacher_avatar_ids.
Assign each genre to a unique avatar ID sequentially from the retrieved list.
Save the genre-to-avatar mapping in memory with the key genres.genre_avatar_assignments for use in future actions.
